title: Feel Your Emotions
html: Stub. Recurring self-instruction in 2024 05 13 things: "feel your emotions, do not block them off. Recognize what is happening within you." The line repeats verbatim across multiple date headers — a self-coaching mantra from a stretch where Yahir was clearly trying to override a default of suppression.
